text:
Once upon a forest, there lay a grand castle, ancient and mysterious. The castle was home to the wise old raven who ruled over the birds, and it was known far and wide for its enchanted library that contained books on every subject imaginable.

Every day, the birds would flock to the library to hear stories from the raven who could bring the past to life. One peculiar tale that fascinated the birds was of a mischievous squirrel who dared to climb up the castle walls to read the secrets inside.

The squirrel discovered that the books told tales not only of ancient queens and rulers but also of a powerful artifact—a shield imbued with wisdom and protection. Intrigued, the squirrel began to collect clues about who could possess such a shield. Every night, the squirrel would fly around the castle, listening close to the floors' whispers and observing silhouettes that shrouded themselves in shadow.

One dewy dawn, while the squirrels chattered away about who could wield such might
